calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), & 856
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden for James Farrell (Petitioner/Trustee).

Ms. McFadden stated that she submitted a waiver of notice on November 28th indicating that the Beneficiaries are not objecting to the petition. The Petition to Find Assets are Property of Trust, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: F Ruiz. Not reported.
